title: Verify dynamic content in the incentive offer pop-up
description: Tests that the discount price and offer title in the incentive pop-up are controlled by the backend.
preconditions: QA has access to the backend configuration for the offer.

steps.description: 1. In the backend, set the offer title to 'QA Test Offer' and the price to '₹99'.
2. As a user, navigate through the cancellation flow to trigger the incentive pop-up.
3. Verify the pop-up displays the title 'QA Test Offer' and the price '₹99'.
4. In the backend, change the title to 'Special Deal' and price to '₹49'.
5. Trigger the pop-up again (with a different user or after a reset).
6. Verify the pop-up now displays the updated title and price.

expected_result: The incentive offer pop-up correctly and dynamically displays the content configured in the backend, without requiring a new app build.
